Korean BBQ and Hot Pot Menu - KPOT
Korean BBQ and Hot Pot Menu
Lunch
Join us for a flavorful lunch at KPOT, where you can enjoy our extensive Korean BBQ and Hot Pot menu, all served with fresh ingredients and bold flavors to satisfy your midday cravings. Plus, with quick service and ingredients ready to go, you won't spend your whole lunch break waiting.

Dinner
Gather your friends and family for an unforgettable dinner at KPOT, where Korean BBQ and hot pot come together for a fun, interactive dining experience filled with mouthwatering flavors and shared moments around the table. See our Korean BBQ and Hot Pot menus below!

--- Page: /about-us ---
About Us - KPOT
About us
A tradition
1,000
years
in the making
Want to learn about KPOT?
KPOT was born from four friends from different backgrounds who wanted to enjoy their cultures together over a shared table.
Korean BBQ
Korean BBQ
The history of Korean BBQ dates back centuries and is deeply rooted in Korean culinary traditions. The tradition of grilling meat over open flames has been a part of Korean cuisine for thousands of years. With the invention of the tabletop grill, it has become a popular dining experience where guests grill a variety of meats and veggies at the table. It’s a social and interactive meal known for its bold flavors, communal atmosphere, and the interactive aspect of cooking the food yourself at the table.
See the KBBQ Menu
Hot Pot
Hot Pot
Hot Pot has a rich history that spans centuries and is deeply rooted in Asian culinary traditions. It is a beloved culinary tradition due to its communal dining experience where friends and family gather around a simmering pot of broth, cooking and sharing a variety of meats, seafood, vegetables, and noodles. At KPOT we give you a choice of a variety of broth flavors so each guest can customize their meal to their specific taste.
See the Hot Pot Menu
Sauce & Appetizer Bar
Sauce & Appetizer Bar
At KPOT Korean BBQ & Hot Pot, the sauce and appetizer bar is an essential part of the dining experience, offering a variety of bold flavors and fresh accompaniments. The sauce bar allows guests to customize their meals with a wide selection of dipping sauces, from savory soy-based mixtures to spicy chili blends, giving each bite a personalized kick. The appetizer bar features an assortment of small plates and side dishes like kimchi, pickled vegetables, and seasoned salads, providing the perfect balance to the rich, smoky flavors of Korean BBQ and the comforting warmth of hot pot.
See the Menu
Beverages & Bar
Beverages & Bar
Our bar isn’t just a place to grab a drink—it’s where unforgettable nights begin! Whether you're toasting with handcrafted cocktails, sipping on ice-cold beers, or exploring our curated selection of wines and spirits, there’s something for everyone. Our menu is packed with bold flavors, from refreshing classics to creative concoctions you won’t find anywhere else. Pair your drinks with Korean BBQ or Hot Pot, soak in the lively atmosphere, and let the good times roll. Whether you're catching up with friends, celebrating a big win, or just unwinding after a long day, we’ve got the perfect pour waiting for you. Cheers!
See the Bar Menu

At KPOT, we believe dining should be more than just a meal—it should be an experience. Whether you’re gathering with friends, celebrating a special occasion, or simply indulging in a feast, every bite is designed to be unforgettable.
One of the best things about dining at KPOT? Our unbeatable promotions! At KPOT, we’re always looking for ways to elevate your experience while giving you the best value possible. Our promotions at KPOT ensure you can enjoy more of what you love—without compromise. Whether you’re craving an all-you-can-eat Korean BBQ spread or warming up with a flavorful hot pot feast, we’ve got special deals to make every visit even more rewarding.
Looking for a reason to treat yourself? Our exclusive happy hour specials feature handcrafted cocktails, refreshing drinks, and delicious bites at irresistible prices. Plus, we believe birthdays should be celebrated in style—that’s why you always eat FREE on your birthday at KPOT! Gather your crew, fire up the grill, and make memories over mouthwatering flavors and unbeatable deals.
Come hungry, bring your friends, and let’s make your next meal at KPOT one to remember.
Rewards and participation vary by location.
Participation may vary.        Check your nearest location page for more information and local offers!
